gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the greenhouse, updating the daily metrics and health checks for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot and Polly the bee acting as gardeners, watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse to represent the automated health checks and metrics updates.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and a cute bee mascot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and a cute bee mascot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
